codeReview.summary: The fix successfully addresses the original failure. A new integration test file (crates/swell-orchestrator/tests/concurrent_registry.rs) was created with 505 lines and 8 comprehensive test cases that verify DashMap fine-grained concurrent access. All 8 tests pass with --test-threads=4.

summary: PASS - The fix adequately addresses the original failure. The concurrent_registry test file was created at crates/swell-orchestrator/tests/concurrent_registry.rs with 8 tests that comprehensively verify: (1) concurrent task creation with 8 threads, (2) parallel reads via DashMap sharding, (3) parallel writes via per-task RwLock, (4) mixed read/write operations under contention with 12 threads, (5) same-task access properly serialized, (6) no deadlock under 16-thread stress test, (7) get_tasks_by_state works under concurrency, (8) remove/create race conditions. All tests pass with --test-threads=4 and cargo clippy shows no warnings.
